headline: Warner Bros. Discovery: Actually Soft, Not Strong, Earnings; But The Merger Would Cure All, Will It Close?
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery EBITDA improvements are overstated and Paramount merger risks outweigh studio growth. Read why WBD stock is a hold.

headline: At TV upfronts, AI is in and corporate shuffles are reshaping the lineup
summary: Advertisers will be hearing about the slate of live events in the coming year — and how AI is being integrated. Plus, media consolidation reshapes the lineup.
